name: uxd-online-style-guide
description: Style Guide for writing internal IRS applications using the Online Design Guide

scripts.dev-cl: concurrently --prefix "[{name}]" --names "ols-ui,docs-app,odg-app" --kill-others "cd ols-ui; bash support/build-library --watch" "sleep 30; cd odg-app; yarn dev" "sleep 30; cd docs-app; yarn dev"
scripts.lint: pushd ols-ui; npm run lint; popd; pushd odg-app; npm run lint
scripts.lint-script: pushd ols-ui; npm run lint-script; popd; pushd odg-app; npm run lint-script
scripts.lint-style: pushd ols-ui; npm run lint-style; popd; pushd odg-app; npm run lint-style

author: The IRS-UXD Prototyping Team
